3042.issue: [S3042] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "check-and-lint" uses "ioBroker/testing-action-check@v2.0.0" with a pinned version. Consider locking only the major version "@v2" instead.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5042.issue: [W5042] Package "react" is used in source file(s) (src-www/src/settings.ts) but not found in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/package.json). Dependency might be missing.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/lib/library.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (src/main.ts). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

6022.issue: [S6022] CHANGELOG_OLD.md exists but no link to it was found in [README.md](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.plex/blob/master/README.md). Consider adding a link to CHANGELOG_OLD.md at the end of the Changelog section.
